changes: Integrate bounded Obfuscar hardening into the ui_scroller lane with a lane-local obfuscation config and reusable obfuscation script.
Add a Build-UiScroller.ps1 wrapper that builds the raw DLL, obfuscates it by default, writes release receipts, and deploys exactly one versioned plugin DLL.
Keep the FAUiScroller host type stable while hardening the rest of the assembly so live VaM testing can verify hardening without changing the single-file deployment rule.
